title: ANGRAU Notification 2026 - Walk-in interview for Physical Director Posts
description: The Acharya N.G. Ranga Agricultural University (ANGRAU) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancy for 01 Physical Director Post. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their Any Degree, Post-graduation, or Ph.D. can apply for the ANGRAU Notification 2026 . The interested applicants can attend the walk-in interview. Here we have mentioned the educational details,...
